## Crypto\_2.BrowserCryptoProvider.encrypt() method

Encrypts plaintext using AES-256-GCM.

**Signature:**

```typescript
encrypt(plaintext: string, key: Uint8Array): Promise<Result<IEncryptionResult>>;
```
